subcodes.first_line: O sincere servant of God! Truthfulness and sincerity became the cause of thy guidance and enabled thee to attain this heavenly bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق الهی صدق و راستی سبب هدایت تو گردید و باین موهبت فائز نمود اگر
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @living waters; water of life, @Imam Husayn, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness
